title: Escape Room: La pel·lícula
overview: Four friends. One room. Many secrets. And only one way out: the truth. The season's most hilarious comedy turns the tables on two couples set to have a great night in an escape room. If they want to escape this unpredictable and crazy game, they'll have to put their friendship to the test. The moment of truth has arrived for them.
